zh.Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United King: 英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林
zh.Dunfermline,Fife,Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Atkin於大約1557年出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林時，她的父親Mungo Aitken57歲，母親Janet Gilchrist57歲。她於大約1527年與David Anderson在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1599年在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林享年43歲。

zh-hans.Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United King: 英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林
zh-hans.Dunfermline,Fife,Scotland: 英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Atkin于大约1557年出生在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林时，她的父亲Mungo Aitken57岁，母亲Janet Gilchrist57岁。她于大约1527年与David Anderson在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1599年在苏格兰費伏登福姆林享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Atkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Atkin (composed of Ade + the diminutive suffix -kin). This is one of the many medieval pet forms of Adam . Compare Scottish Aitken .

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Muslim (mainly Ethiopia) and Arabic: from the personal name Adem, a derivative (in Ethiopia) or a variant (among Arabs, e.g. in Algeria) of Arabic Ādam (see Adam 3). This form of the surname is also found among Christian Arabs (e.g. in Lebanon).

variants.name: Akin
meanings: English: variant of   Atkin   or   Aitken  .
Turkish (Akın): ornamental name, nickname or metonymic occupational name from the military term akın ‘(commando-) raid, foray’.

variants.name: Aikens
meanings: English: variant of Atkin , with genitival or excrescent -s (compare Atkins ).

Dutch and East Frisian: patronymic from the personal name Aike, a diminutive of Aai/Aie, a variant or a short form of the personal names Aaielt, Age, Ad(d)e or Adriaan. In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the variant Eikens .

variants.name: Atkinson
meanings: English (northern): patronymic from the personal name Atkin or Adkin, pet forms of Adam.

variants.name: Atkins
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Atkin (a pet form of Adam) with genitival -s, or a variant of Atkin , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Atkin was born about 1557, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Mungo Aitken, was 57 and her mother, Janet Gilchrist, was 57. She married David Anderson about 1527, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1599, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Atkin est née environ 1557, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Mungo Aitken, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Janet Gilchrist, avait 57 ans. Elle a épousé David Anderson environ 1527, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1599, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Atkin um 1557 in Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Mungo Aitken 57 und ihre Mutter Janet Gilchrist 57. Sie hat um 1527 in Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom David Anderson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1599 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Atkin è nata il circa 1557 nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Mungo Aitken, aveva 57 anni e sua madre, Janet Gilchrist, aveva 57 anni. Lei sposato David Anderson circa 1527, nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1599, nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Atkinが約1557年にイギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインで生まれた時，父Mungo Aitkenは57歳，母Janet Gilchristは57歳であった。約1527年にイギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインでDavid Andersonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1599年にスコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Atkin(이)가 대략 1557년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mungo Aitken(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Gilchrist(은)는 57세였다. 그녀는 대략 1527년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 David Anderson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1599년 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Atkin nasceu aproximadamente 1557, em Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Mungo Aitken, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Janet Gilchrist, tinha 57 anos. Ela casou-se com David Anderson aproximadamente 1527, em Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1599, em Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Atkin родилась около 1557 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Mungo Aitken было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Gilchrist, 57. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Anderson около 1527 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1599 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Atkin nació aproximadamente 1557, en Dunfermline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Mungo Aitken, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Janet Gilchrist, tenía 57 años. Se casó con David Anderson aproximadamente 1527, en Dunfermline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1599, en Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, a la edad de 43 años.
